message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.3.0 → 0.3.1 (crates.io v0.3.1)

asupersync 0.3.1 was published to crates.io ~3h ago (2026-04-21T23:58:52Z).
This is a pure patch release over 0.3.0 with no source-breaking changes.

Scope:
- crates/fp-runtime/Cargo.toml — bump optional dep from 0.3.0 → 0.3.1
  (dependency remains feature-gated via the fp-runtime/asupersync feature,
   default-features = false, optional = true — flags preserved)
- crates/fp-conformance inherits via `fp-runtime/asupersync` feature chain,
  so no Cargo.toml change there.
- Cargo.lock refreshed via `cargo update -p asupersync`, which also pulled
  franken-kernel / franken-evidence / franken-decision from 0.3.0 → 0.3.1
  (these are transitive deps of asupersync and version-locked to it).

Verification (via rch remote worker):
- `rch exec -- cargo check -p fp-runtime --features asupersync --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-runtime --features asupersync` → 30 passed, 0 failed

No call-site changes; the `asupersync::Outcome<T, E>` surface used by
fp-runtime's `outcome_to_action` is unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
